race.comment: GAZELLE (10) returns and it's worth noting she filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last prep at Penola. Was beaten narrowly here twice last campaign and if she can replicate that sort of form she can break through. DEL LIRENZA (12) showed good early speed last start on debut and fought on well to hold third at Ararat. Likely improver who is among the chances. ERAJA (2) progressed nicely last time out when holding onto second at the Sunshine Coast. Drops back in trip off 54 days in-between and debuts the new colours. Is still lightly raced and worth keeping safe. SERILO (9) never stopped trying on debut and is sure to have come on from that. Milnes sticking is a bonus.
